query:
SELECT g.id as gestor_id, g.userId, u.name as user_nome, gl.lojaId, l.nome as loja_nome, l.id as loja_id, l.senhorio, l.contactoSenhorio
FROM gestores g
JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id
JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON g.id = gl.gestorId
JOIN lojas l ON gl.lojaId = l.id
WHERE l.nome LIKE '%amalicao%' OR l.nome LIKE '%amalicã%'
ORDER BY l.nome;

FROM gestores g
JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id
JOIN gestor_lojas gl ON g.id = gl.gestorId
JOIN lojas l ON gl.lojaId = l.id
WHERE l.nome LIKE '%amalicao%' OR l.nome LIKE '%amalicã%'
ORDER BY l.nome;
